name: com.gameup.core
description: Core framework for Unity game development including Singleton, EventBus, FSM, Object Pool, UI Manager, Audio, Save/Load, and more. Git UPM flow: install DOTween first (Assets/Plugins/Demigiant + DOTween.Modules.asmdef), then enable define DOTween__DEPENDENCIES_INSTALLED from GameUp/Project/GameUpCore Installer.
